pi_items.source: GeoServer Training documentation (https://geoserver.geosolutionsgroup.com/edu/en/adv_gsconfig/parameters.html) states 'Out of the box, GeoServer uses 65MB' which equals 65536 KB. Task metadata value of 131072 KB (128 MB) is double the default.
GeoServer Training documentation states 'Out of the box, GeoServer uses...60 seconds' as the default maxRenderingTime. Task metadata value of 120 seconds is double the default.

GeoServer configuration examples and documentation indicate watermark is disabled by default with '<enabled>false</enabled>' in wms.xml configuration. Task metadata requests enabling it (true), which is a change from the default disabled state.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures three WMS settings in GeoServer 2.25.2. All three metadata claims represent non-default values: (1) expected_max_memory of 131072 KB (128 MB) is double the GeoServer default of 65 MB, (2) expected_max_time of 120 seconds is double the default of 60 seconds, and (3) expected_watermark_enabled of true requires enabling a feature that is disabled by default. The task uses real data from GeoServer's REST API to verify settings were changed correctly.
